evals.prompt: I need to review the changes between avalara-tax v1.0.0 and v1.0.1 before approving the PR. Can you compare these versions and show me what changed?
evals.expected_output: Extracts both versions, compares file structures, shows configuration changes (commerce-app.json, hooks.json), identifies modified/added/deleted files, generates comparison report, cleans up both extracted directories

evals.prompt: We had a bug in version 2.1.0 that wasn't in 2.0.9. Can you diff the loqate-address-verification versions to help me find what code changed that might have caused it?
evals.expected_output: Extracts both versions, performs detailed code comparison focusing on JavaScript files, shows hook and service config changes, identifies potential regression sources, reports findings, cleans up

evals.prompt: I want to generate a changelog for the stripe-payment app update from v1.2.0 to v1.3.0. Can you compare the versions and give me a summary of all the changes?
evals.expected_output: Extracts both versions, performs comprehensive comparison, generates structured changelog with file counts, configuration changes, code modifications, breaking changes (if any), cleans up
